title: Plush Eggs Vending Machine
description: Do you like to collect mega super cute surprises plush or toys like Skibidi, Poppy, Pomni, Grimace, etc... etc... So what waiting for? Try to open all chocolate eggs in this great surprise eggs vending machine games? If you say yes... Welcome to the world of cute surprise Plush Toys Lol! Enjoy it!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
